summary: Geriatric oncology consultations significantly alter cancer treatment plans by integrating comprehensive geriatric assessments to consider functionality, health conditions, and lifespan. These adjustments help tailor therapies to align with individualized prognoses and improve outcomes through reduced overtreatment and enhanced focus on quality-of-life objectives.
